questions.question:
A workload priority diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `priority-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `priority-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `batch-api`
- `targetPriorityClass` is `ops-critical`
- `priorityClassInventory` is `kubectl get priorityclass ops-critical -o yaml`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment batch-api -n priority-lab -o wide`
- `priorityClassNameCheck` is `kubectl get deployment batch-api -n priority-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.priorityClassName}'`
- `priorityValueCheck` is `kubectl get priorityclass ops-critical -o jsonpath='{.value}'`
- `preemptionPolicyCheck` is `kubectl get priorityclass ops-critical -o jsonpath='{.preemptionPolicy}'`
- `globalDefaultCheck` is `kubectl get priorityclass ops-critical -o jsonpath='{.globalDefault}'`
- `schedulerCheck` is `kubectl get pods -n priority-lab -o wide`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n priority-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm priorityClassName, priority value, preemption policy, and scheduler events before changing the Deployment manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/priority-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/priority-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `PriorityClass Inventory`, `Workload Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not restart the Deployment, do not delete pods, and do not patch the live PriorityClass or Deployment fields during this drill.

verification.description: The priority diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, PriorityClass inspection commands, scheduler evidence, event check, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact PriorityClass inventory, workload checks, and safe manifest review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe priority remediation guidance is removed
